comments.current_heading: LORE-2026-06-28-007: Six Cities geography / neutral market
comments.ticket_title: LORE-2026-06-28-007: Six Cities geography / neutral market
comments.comment_text: the UIfor this section is confusing. Also when I pull up the mobile keyboard it covers the comment box and this can’t be fixed. Figure out how to integrate this better with the mobile keyboard while preserving a good view of text as much as possible.

We should think about how Serathis presents when Kelyra and Davian find her. She wouldn’t expect that Kelyra overcomes her block, or be somewhat surprised at least. And Drosin is dead. But, to some extent Serathis is probably happy because if Maya wiped out her magi and both heirs are dead, that means that Kelyra and Davian being alive still means that Archeon can live. She might offer Kelyra and Davian the option to submit to her, or join, or something. Kelyra should say that Serathis of all people should know that’s not how this is going to end. Serathis smiles at this; to her at least, this is fulfilling / showing that Kelyra is fit to succeed her and is likely to carry on her agenda of destroying the High Clades.
